# Romain Boces Solution Inc.

> An independent software studio based in Montreal, Canada, designing and building mobile and web applications.

Romain Boces Solution Inc. is a Canadian-incorporated software studio run by Romain Boces out of Montreal. The company focuses on building clean, reliable, and privacy-conscious applications for iOS, Android, and the web.

## Company

- Legal name: Romain Boces Solution Inc.
- Type: Incorporated company (Canada)
- Location: Montreal, Quebec, Canada
- Founder: Romain Boces
- Structure: Solo developer / independent studio

## Focus

- iOS applications
- Android applications
- Web applications
- Privacy-conscious software design

## Contact

- Email: romainboces@gmail.com
- Website: https://romainboces.com

## Links

- Website: https://romainboces.com
